attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
     MNL.ADJ_CODE,
     MNL.ADJ_TYPE,
     CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))  CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
     MNL.CREATION_DATE,     
     COALESCE (MNL.DEAL_ID, 'UNKNOWN'),  
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS ETL_PROCESS_DTM,
     MNL.EU_CUST_CITY,
     MNL.EU_CUST_COUNTRY,
     MNL.EU_CUST_NAME,
     MNL.EU_CUST_POSTAL_CODE,
     MNL.EU_CUST_STATE,
     MNL.EU_PARTY_ID,
     MNL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,  
     MNL.ORDER_DATE,
     MNL.ORDER_LINE_ID,   
     MNL.ORDER_QUANTITY,
     MNL.PART_NUMBER,
     MNL.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
     MNL.SERVICE_TYPE,
       MNL.BILL_TO_PARTY_ID,
       MNL.BILL_CUST_NAME,
       MNL.BILL_CUST_CITY,
       MNL.BILL_CUST_STATE,
       MNL.BILL_CUST_POSTAL_CODE,
       MNL.BILL_CUST_COUNTRY,
     MNL.SHIP_CUST_CITY,
     MNL.SHIP_CUST_COUNTRY,
     MNL.SHIP_CUST_NAME,
     MNL.SHIP_CUST_POSTAL_CODE,
     MNL.SHIP_CUST_STATE,
     MNL.SHIP_TO_PARTY_ID,
     MNL.SOLD_CUST_CITY,
     MNL.SOLD_CUST_COUNTRY,
     MNL.SOLD_CUST_NAME,
     MNL.SOLD_CUST_POSTAL_CODE,
     MNL.SOLD_CUST_STATE,
     MNL.SOLD_TO_PARTY_ID,
     MNL.SOURCE_CREATION_DATE,  
     MNL.TRX_ID,
     MNL.TRX_NUMBER,
    MNL.TRX_ORIG_CODE,
     MNL.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE, 
     HIST.TRX_TYPE_CODE,   
     HIST.TRX_USAGE_CODE ,    
     MNL.UNIT_COST,
     MNL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
     MNL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
     UUSR.USER_NAME AS UPLOADED_USER,         
     AUSR.USER_NAME AS APPROVED_USER ,     
       COALESCE(MNL.ATTRIBUTE_1,'UNKNOWN'),    
       COALESCE(MNL.ATTRIBUTE_2,'UNKNOWN'),    
       COALESCE(MNL.ATTRIBUTE_3,'UNKNOWN'),    
       COALESCE(MNL.ATTRIBUTE_4,'UNKNOWN'),    
       COALESCE(MNL.ATTRIBUTE_5,'UNKNOWN'),    
       COALESCE(MNL.PRODUCT_FAMILY,'UNKNOWN'), 
       COALESCE(MNL.RESELLER_PO_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS RESELLER_PO_NUM, 
       COALESCE(MNL.FLV_ATTRIBUTE5,'=')  AS Reporting_Type,  
       MNL.ADJ_INITIATOR,  
       'UNKNOWN' AS COMMENTS ,    
      HIST.SOURCE_TRX_ID
     FROM
 (SELECT MNL_INNER.*, FLV.ATTRIBUTE5 AS FLV_ATTRIBUTE5 FROM
	 (SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.XXOTM_PHX_MANUAL_TRX XPMT
	 WHERE XPMT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >CAST('$$LastExtractDate' AS TIMESTAMP(0))-interval '2' hour
	 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  TRX_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) MNL_INNER
	 INNER JOIN
	 (SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.FND_LOOKUP_VALUES
	 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  LOOKUP_CODE,LOOKUP_TYPE,LANG,SECURITY_GROUP_ID,VIEW_APPLICATION_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) FLV
	 ON MNL_INNER.ADJ_CODE=FLV.LOOKUP_CODE
	 AND FLV.LOOKUP_TYPE='XXOTM_PHX_MANUAL_TRANS_TYPE'
	 AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 ='BACKEND' 
	 AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE1='XAAS Transaction'
 ) MNL
 INNER JOIN 
 (SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.XXOTM_PHX_TRX_HISTORY
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  SOURCE_TRX_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) HIST
 ON MNL.TRX_ID=HIST.TRX_ID
 INNER JOIN
 (SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.FND_USER
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  USER_NAME,USER_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) UUSR
 ON  MNL.CREATED_BY=UUSR.USER_ID
 INNER JOIN
 (SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.FND_USER
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  USER_NAME,USER_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) AUSR
 ON MNL.LAST_UPDATED_BY=AUSR.USER_ID
